title: MUSABYIMANA N’UNDI v. ECOBANK RWANDA Plc N’UNDI
text:
MUSABYIMANA N’UNDI v. ECOBANK RWANDA Plc N’UNDI
[Rwanda URUKIKO RW’UBUJURIRE – RCOMAA 00078/2024/CA (Ngagi, P.J.,) 10 Ukuboza
2025]
Amategeko agenga imibiranishirize y’imanza – Kwakira ikirego – Gutambamira urubanza –
Ntabwo umuburanyi yemerewe gutambamira urubanza rutakiriye ikirego. Kugirango ikirego cyo
gutambamira urubanza cyakirwe, urwo rubanza rugomba kuba rwaraburanishijwe mu mizi kandi
rutagishoboye kujuririrwa.
Incamake y’ikibazo: Sosiyete INTERTRADE FC Ltd ivuga ko yagiranye amasezerano
y’inguzanyo na ECOBANK RWANDA Plc, igenda yishyura ariko umwenda nturangire kuko
itamenyaga aho amafaranga ashyirwa, ibyo byatumye iyirega mu Rukiko rw’Ubucuruzi rwa
Nyarugenge, irusaba kwemeza ko umwenda isigayemo ungana na 145.750.340Frw, aho kuba
398.018.168Frw, inasaba indishyi zitandukanye.
Urukiko rw’Ubucuruzi rwa Nyarugenge rwemeje ko ikirego cya INTERTRADE FC Ltd nta
shingiro gifite, maze ijurira icyo cyemezo mu Rukiko Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi, ivuga ko Urukiko
rw’Ubucuruzi rwa Nyarugenge rwirengagije ibimenyetso yarushyikirije bigatuma itsindwa.
Urukiko Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi rwemeje ko ubujurire bwa INTERTRADE FC Ltd nta shingiro
bufite, bityo ko nta gihindutse ku mikirize y’urubanza rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubucuruzi rwa
Nyarugenge.
Mu mwaka wa 2021, hari urubanza RCOMAA 00067/2020/CA rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire,
aho ECOBANK RWANDA Plc yaburanye na Somayire Rubona Freddy na Musabyimana Célestin
isaba Urukiko kubahatira kwishyura umwenda wa 210.115. 808Frw ukomoka ku bwishingire
bw’umwenda wa INTERTRADE FC Ltd, urwo Rukiko rwemeza ko ubujurire bwatanzwe na
Musabyimana Célestin na Somayire Rubona Freddy nta shingiro bufite.
Urwo rubanza Somayire Rubona Freddy na Musabyimana Célestin barusubirishijemo ingingo
nshya, maze Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rwemeza ko ikirego batanze cyo gusubirishamo ingingo nshya
urubanza RCOMAA 00067/2020/CA rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 23/04/2021 nta
shingiro gifite, bityo ko urwo rubanza rugumanye agaciro karwo.
Sosiyete INTERTRADE FC Ltd yasubirishijemo urubanza RCOMA 0256/15/HCC rwaciwe
n’Urukiko Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi ku wa 03/07/2015 ingingo nshya, ivuga ko nyuma yuko urwo
rubanza ruciwe, yaje kubona ibimenyetso bishya bigizwe na Attestation de main levée
hypothécaire yo ku wa 07/10/2011 yerekeye amasezerano ya mbere y’inguzanyo ya 260.000.000
Frw, ECOBANK RWANDA Plc yari yarayihaye, ndetse na raporo y’inzobere (expert) yatanzwe
mu rubanza N° 00001/2021/CA.
Mu rubanza RS/REV/RCOM 00008/2022/HCC rwaciwe ku wa 17/11/2023, Urukiko Rukuru
rw’Ubucuruzi rwemeje ko ikirego cya INTERTRADE FC Ltd cyo gusubirishamo ingingo nshya
urubanza RCOMA 00256/15/HCC kitakiriwe.

Musabyimana Celestin na Somayire Rubona Freddy batambamiye imikirize y’urubanza
RS/REV/RCOM 00008/2022/HCC bavuga ko kutakira ikirego cya INTERTRADE FC Ltd
cyafashwe muri urwo rubanza kibabangamiye kuko kibatera igihombo, nk’abanyamigabane ba
INTERTRADE FC Ltd basanga ari bo bigiraho ingaruka, bityo bakaba bafite inyungu zo kurega
kuko ari bo bazishyura amafaranga iyo sosiyete igomba ECOBANK RWANDA Plc,
Musabyimana Celestin na Somayire Rubona Freddy basaba nanone Urukiko ko nyuma yo
gusuzuma niba bafite uburenganzira bwo gutambamira urwo rubanza, rwasuzuma kandi niba
"Attestation de main levée hypothécaire" na raporo y’umuhanga yagaragaye mu rubanza
N°00001/2021/CA byafatwa nk'ibimenyetso bishya muri urwo rubanza.
ECOBANK RWANDA Plc yaburanye ivuga ko nta burenganzira Musabyimana Célestin na
Somayire Rubona Freddy bafite bwo gutambamira urubanza RS/REV/RCOM 00008/2022/HCC,
kuko isanga ibyo baregera barabiburanye mu Rukiko rw’Ubujurire mu rubanza Nº00001/2021/CA
rwamaze kuba Itegeko, bityo ko ikirego cyabo kidakwiye kwakirwa mu gihe ababaye ababuranyi
muri urwo rubanza ari bamwe, ndetse n’ikiburanwa ari kimwe.
INTERTRADE Ltd yagobokeshejwe mu rubanza ivuga ko isanga ibijyanye n’iyakirwa ry’icyo
kirego byarasuzumwe bigafatwaho umwanzuro mu nama ntegurarubanza, bityo ko hakwiye
gusuzumwa ibijyanye n’urubanza mu mizi (fond), ivuga ko ikimenyetso gishya cyatanzwe kigizwe
na main levée hypothecaire Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rwemeje ko ari ikimenyetso gishya, bityo ko
icyemezo rwafashe kitavuguruzwa n’icyafashwe n’Urukiko Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi.
Urukiko Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi, rwemeje ko Musabyimana Célestin na Somayire Rubona Freddy
nta burenganzira bafite bwo kongera kuregera ibyo Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rwamaze gufataho
icyemezo mu buryo budasubirwaho.
Musabyimana Célestin na Somayire Rubona Freddy bajuririye mu Rukiko rw’Ubujurire, bavuga
ko mu rubanza rujuririrwa, Urukiko Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi rwakoze ikosa ryo kutakira ikirego
cyabo cyo gutambamira urubanza RS/REV/RCOM 00008/2022/HCC kandi icyaburanwe mu
rubanza rujuririrwa gitandukanye n’icyaburanwe mu rubanza Nº00001/2021/CA, ndetse
n’ababuranyi atari bamwe, bityo ko rero ikirego cyabo cyagombaga kwakirwa.
INTERTRADE FC Ltd ivuga ko ikirego cya Musabyimana Célestin na Somayire Rubona Freddy
cyagombaga kwakirwa, kuko icyaregewe gitandukanye n’icyaregewe, urebye isesengura Urukiko
rwakoze mu rubanza RS/REV/RCOM 00008/2022/HCC usanga rwaraburanishijwe mu mizi.
ECOBANK RWANDA Plc yiregura ivuga ko nta kosa Urukiko Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi rwakoze
ryo kutakira ikirego cya Musabyimana Célestin na Somayire Rubona Freddy kuko ibyo
baburanisha byaburanwe mu rubanza Nº00001/2021/CA rwabaye itegeko nabo babayemo
ababuranyi, ivuga ko amategeko atemera gutambamira urubanza rutaburanishijwe mu mizi, bityo
ko nta kosa Urukiko Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi rwakoze kutakira ikirego cyabo.
Incamake y’icyemezo: Ntabwo umuburanyi yemerewe gutambamira urubanza rutakiriye ikirego.
Kugirango ikirego cyo gutambamira urubanza cyakirwe, urwo rubanza rugomba kuba
rwaraburanishijwe mu mizi kandi rutagishoboye kujuririrwa.

Ubujurire nta shingiro bufite.
Amategeko yashingiweho:
Itegeko Nº 22/2018 ryo ku wa 29/04/2018 ryerekeye imiburanishirize y’imanza
z’imbonezamubano, iz’ubucuruzi, iz’umurimo n’iz’ubutegetsi, ingingo ya 161.
Nta manza zifashishijwe.
Urubanza
I. IMITERERE Y’URUBANZA
[1] INTERTRADE FC Ltd ivuga ko yagiranye amasezerano y’inguzanyo na ECOBANK
RWANDA Plc, igenda yishyura ariko umwenda nturangire kuko itamenyaga aho amafaranga
ashyirwa. Ibyo byatumye iyirega mu Rukiko rw’Ubucuruzi rwa Nyarugenge, irusaba kwemeza ko
umwenda isigayemo ungana na 145.750.340Frw, aho kuba 398.018.168Frw, inasaba indishyi
zitandukanye.
[2] Mu rubanza RCOM 1250/04/TC/NYGE rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubucuruzi rwa
Nyarugenge ku wa 23/04/2015, urwo Rukiko rwemeje ko ikirego cya INTERTRADE FC Ltd nta
shingiro gifite. INTERTRADE FC Ltd yajuririye icyo cyemezo mu Rukiko Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi,
ivuga ko Urukiko rw’Ubucuruzi rwa Nyarugenge rwirengagije ibimenyetso yarushyikirije
bigatuma itsindwa, urubanza ruburanishwa ECOBANK RWANDA Plc idahari kuko ititabye nta
mpamvu yamenyesheje Urukiko yatumye ititaba.
[3] Mu rubanza RCOMA 0256/15/HCC rwaciwe ku wa 03/07/2015, Urukiko Rukuru
rw’Ubucuruzi rwemeje ko ubujurire bwa INTERTRADE FC Ltd nta shingiro bufite, ko nta
gihindutse ku mikirize y’urubanza RCOM 1250/04/TC/NYGE rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubucuruzi
rwa Nyarugenge ku wa 23/04/2015, rutegeka INTERTRADE FC Ltd guha ECOBANK
RWANDA Plc 600.000 Frw y’igihembo cya Avoka n’ikurikiranarubanza.
[4] Hari urubanza RCOMAA 00067/2020/CA rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa
23/04/2021, ECOBANK RWANDA Plc yaburanye na Somayire Rubona Freddy na Musabyimana
Célestin isaba Urukiko kubahatira kwishyura umwenda wa 210.115. 808Frw ukomoka ku
bwishingire bw’umwenda wa INTERTRADE FC Ltd, urwo Rukiko rwemeza ko ubujurire
bwatanzwe na Musabyimana Célestin na Somayire Rubona Freddy nta shingiro bufite, ko
imikirize y’urubanza RCOMA 00201/2019/HCC rwaciwe n’Urukiko Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi ku wa
18/12/2019 idahindutse, rubategeka gufatanya kwishyura ECOBANK RWANDA Plc 1.000.000
Frw y’igihembo cya Avoka. Urwo rubanza Somayire Rubona Freddy na Musabyimana Célestin
barusubirishijemo ingingo nshya, maze mu rubanza N°00001/2021/CA rwaciwe ku wa
13/05/2022, Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rwemeza ko ikirego batanze cyo gusubirishamo ingingo nshya
urubanza RCOMAA 00067/2020/CA rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 23/04/2021 nta
shingiro gifite, ko urwo rubanza rugumanye agaciro karwo, rubategeka gufatanya guha
ECOBANK RWANDA Plc 800.000 Frw y’igihembo cya Avoka. Mu kugera kuri uwo mwanzuro

Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rwasesenguye inyandiko yiswe "Acte de main levée hypothécaire"
yanditswe na ECOBANK RWANDA Plc ku wa 07/10/2011 na raporo y’umuhanga.
[5] INTERTRADE FC Ltd yasubirishijemo urubanza RCOMA 0256/15/HCC rwaciwe
n’Urukiko Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi ku wa 03/07/2015 ingingo nshya, ivuga ko nyuma yuko urwo
rubanza ruciwe, yaje kubona ibimenyetso bishya bigizwe na Attestation de main levée
hypothécaire yo ku wa 07/10/2011 yerekeye amasezerano ya mbere y’inguzanyo ya 260.000.000
Frw, ECOBANK RWANDA Plc yari yarayihaye, ndetse na raporo y’inzobere (expert) yatanzwe
mu rubanza N° 00001/2021/CA. Mu rubanza RS/REV/RCOM 00008/2022/HCC rwaciwe ku wa
17/11/2023, Urukiko Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi rwemeje ko ikirego cya INTERTRADE FC Ltd cyo
gusubirishamo ingingo nshya urubanza RCOMA 00256/15/HCC, kitakiriwe, ko INTERTRADE
FC Ltd igomba kwishyura ECOBANK RWANDA Plc 500.000 Frw y’igihembo cya Avoka.
[6] Musabyimana Celestin na Somayire Rubona Freddy batambamiye imikirize y’urubanza
RS/REV/RCOM 00008/2022/HCC ku mpamvu zo kuba icyemezo cyo kutakira ikirego cya
INTERTRADE FC Ltd cyafashwe muri urwo rubanza kibabangamiye kuko kibatera igihombo,
basobanura ko nk’abanyamigabane ba INTERTRADE FC Ltd basanga ari bo bigiraho ingaruka,
bakaba rero bafite inyungu zo kurega kuko ari bo bazishyura amafaranga iyo sosiyete igomba
ECOBANK RWANDA Plc. Bityo basaba Urukiko ko nyuma yo gusuzuma niba bafite
uburenganzira bwo gutambamira urwo rubanza, rwazanasuzuma niba "Attestation de main levée
hypothécaire" na raporo y’umuhanga GPO Partners yagaragaye mu rubanza N°00001/2021/CA
byafatwa nk'ibimenyetso bishya muri urwo rubanza.
[7] ECOBANK RWANDA Plc yaburanye ivuga ko nta burenganzira Musabyimana Célestin
na Somayire Rubona Freddy bafite bwo gutambamira urubanza RS/REV/RCOM
00008/2022/HCC, kuko isanga ibyo baregera barabiburanye mu Rukiko rw’Ubujurire mu rubanza
Nº00001/2021/CA rwamaze kuba Itegeko, bikaba bitashoboka ko urwo Rukiko rwongera
gusuzuma ibyafashweho icyemezo n’Urukiko rurukuriye, no kuba mu rubanza batambamira
ikirego kitarakiriwe, nta kindi cyasuzumwa ku birebana n’imizi y’urubanza. Bityo ko ikirego
cyabo kidakwiye kwakirwa mu gihe ababaye ababuranyi muri urwo rubanza ari bamwe, ndetse
n’ikiburanwa ari kimwe.
[8] INTERTRADE Ltd yagobokeshejwe mu rubanza ivuga ko isanga ibijyanye n’iyakirwa
ry’icyo kirego byarasuzumwe bigafatwaho umwanzuro mu nama ntegurarubanza, bityo ko
hakwiye gusuzumwa ibijyanye n’urubanza mu mizi (fond). Mu iburanisha isobanura ko mu
rubanza N00001/2021/CA ikimenyetso gishya cyatanzwe kigizwe na main levée hypothecaire
Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rwemeje ko ari ikimenyetso gishya, bityo ko icyemezo rwafashe
kitavuguruzwa n’icyafashwe n’Urukiko Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi.
[9] Mu rubanza RCOMA 00063/2024/HCC rwaciwe n’Urukiko Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi ku wa
10/10/2024, urwo Rukiko rushingiye ku ngingo ya 14 y’Itegeko Nº 22/2018 ryo ku wa 29/04/2018
ryerekeye imiburanishirizie y’imanza z’imbonezamubano, iz’iubucuruzi, iz’umurimo,
iz’ubutegetsi rwemeje ko Musabyimana Célestin na Somayire Rubona Freddy nta burenganzira
bafite bwo kongera kuregera ibyo Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rwamaze gufataho icyemezo mu buryo
budasubirwaho mu rubanza N00001/2021/CA, ko ikirego cyatanzwe na Musabyimana Célestin
na Somayire Rubona Freddy kitakiriwe, ko imikirize y’urubanza RS/REV/RCOM

00008/2022/HCC rwaciwe n’urwo Rukiko idahindutse; rubategeka guha ECOBANK RWANDA
Plc 800.000 Frw y’igihembo cya Avoka, na 100.000 Frw y’ikurikiranarubanza.
[10] Musabyimana Célestin na Somayire Rubona Freddy bajuririye urwo rubanza mu Rukiko
rw’Ubujurire, ubujurire bwabo bwandikwa kuri RCOMAA 00078/2024/CA. Urubanza
rwaburanishijwe mu ruhame ku wa 03/12/2025, Musabyimana Célestin na Somayire Rubona
Freddy bahagarariwe na Me Vital Ntagengwa, ECOBANK RWANDA Plc ihagarariwe na Me
Bimenyimana Eric, INTERTRADE FC Ltd ihagarariwe n’umucungamutungo w’igihombo Me
Ruhana Dan yunganiwe na Me Masumbuko NDE Emile.
[11] Mu myanzuro no mu miburanire yabo, Musabyimana Célestin na Somayire Rubona Freddy
bavuga ko mu rubanza rujuririrwa RCOMA 00063/2024/HCC, Urukiko Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi
rwakoze ikosa ryo kutakira ikirego cyabo cyo gutambamira urubanza RS/REV/RCOM
00008/2022/HCC rushingiye ku ngingo ya 14 y’Itegeko Nº 22/2018 ryo ku wa 29/04/2018
ryerekeye imiburanishirize y’imanza z’imbonezamubano, iz’ubucuruzi, iz’umurimo
n’iz’ubutegetsi kandi icyaburanwe mu rubanza rujuririrwa gitandukanye n’icyaburanwe mu
rubanza Nº 00001/2021/CA, ndetse n’ababuranyi atari bamwe, ko rero ikirego cyabo cyagombaga
kwakirwa; basoza basaba amafaranga y’ikurikiranarubanza n’igihembo cya Avoka.
INTERTRADE FC Ltd ivuga ko ikirego cya Musabyimana Célestin na Somayire Rubona Freddy
cyagombaga kwakirwa, kuko icyaregewe gitandukanye n’icyaregewe mu rubanza Nº
00001/2021/CA, isoza isaba amafaranga y’ikurikiranarubanza n’igihembo cya Avoka.
[12] ECOBANK RWANDA Plc yiregura ivuga ko nta kosa Urukiko Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi
rwakoze ryo kutakira ikirego cya Musabyimana Célestin na Somayire Rubona Freddy kuko ibyo
baburanisha byaburanwe mu rubanza Nº 00001/2021/CA rwabaye itegeko nabo babayemo
ababuranyi, ko uretse n’ibyo amategeko atemera gutambamira urubanza rutaburanishijwe mu
mizi, bityo ko nta kosa Urukiko Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi rwakoze kutakira ikirego cyabo, isoza isaba
amafaranga y’ikurikiranarubanza n’igihembo cya Avoka.
[13] Hashingiwe kuri izi mpaka, Urukiko rurasuzuma ibibazo bikurikira:
-kumenya niba Urukiko Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi rwarakoze ikosa kutakira ikirego cya
Musabyimana Célestin na Somayire Rubona Freddy;
-kumenya niba amafaranga y’ikurikiranarubanza n’igihembo cya Avoka asabwa muri uru
rubanza afite ishingiro.
II. IBIBAZO BIGIZE URUBANZA N’ISESENGURA RYABYO
1.Kumenya niba Urukiko Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi rwarakoze ikosa kutakira ikirego cya
Musabyimana Célestin na Somayire Rubona Freddy.
[14] Uhagarariye Musabyimana Célestin na Somayire Rubona Freddy avuga ko mu rubanza
RCOMA 00063/2024/HCC, Urukiko Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi rwemeje ko ikirego cyabo cyo
gutambamira urubanza RS/REV/RCOM 00008/2022/HCC kitakiriwe, rushingiye ku ngingo ya 14
y’Itegeko Nº 22/2018 ryo ku wa 29/04/2018 ryavuzwe haruguru, kandi icyaburanwaga muri urwo
rubanza ari ″Gutambamira imikirize y’urubanza RS/REV/RCOM 00008/2022/HCC rwasomwe
tariki ya 17/11/2023, aho haregerwaga kwemeza ko umwenda INTERTRADE FC Ltd ibereyemo

ECOBANK RWANDA Ltd ungana na 145.750.340 Frw aho kuba 398.018.168 Frw, Indishyi
zinyuranye ″, ababuranyi ari Musabyimana Celestin na Somayire Rubona Freddy bajuriye,
ECOBANK RWANDA Plc yarezwe ndetse na INTERTRADE FC Ltd yagobokeshejwe, naho mu
rubanza Nº 00001/2021/CA ikibunwa ari: ″ Guhatira Somayire Rubona Freddy na Musabyimana
Célestin kwishyura umwenda wa 210.115. 808 Frw ukomoka ku bwishingire bw’umwenda wa
INTERTRADE F&C Ltd./Gusubirishamo ingingo nshya urubanza RCOMAA 00067/2020/CA
rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 23/04/2021″, ababuranyi bakaba Musabyimana Célestin
na Somayire Rubona Freddy baregaga, naho ECOBANK RWANDA Plc iregwa. Bityo ko kuba
ababaye ababuranyi mu rubanza rujuririrwa RCOMA 00063/2024/HCC atari bo babaye
ababuranyi mu rubanza Nº00001/2021/CA, kuko INTERTRADE FC Ltd itarubayemo
umuburanyi, no kuba ibiburanwa atari bimwe, asanga Urukiko Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi rwagombaga
kwakira ikirego cya Musabyimana Célestin na Somayire Rubona Freddy, kuko ibiteganywa
n’ingingo ya 14 y’Itegeko Nº 22/2018 ryo ku wa 29/04/2018 ryavuzwe haruguru bitagombaga
gushingirwaho.
[15] Akomeza avuga ko ku bijyanye n’ibyo uhagarariye ECOBANK RWANDA Plc avuga ko
ikirego cya Musabyimana Célestin na Somayire Rubona Freddy kuko batambamiye urubanza
rutaburanishijwe mu mizi yarwo, asanga ibyo atari ukuri, kuko urebye urubanza RS/REV/RCOM
00008/2022/HCC usanga rwaragiye mu mizi. Bityo ko ibyo uhagarariye ECOBANK RWANDA
Plc avuga nta shingiro bifite.
[16] Uhagarariye INTERTRADE FC Ltd n’umwunganira bavuga ko Urukiko Rukuru
rw’Ubucuruzi mu kwemeza ko ikirego cyatanzwe na Musabyimana Celestin na Somayire Rubona
Freddy kitakiriwe, rwitiranyije urubanza rwatambamirwaga n’urubanza N 00001/2021/CA,
ECOBANK RWANDA Plc yaregagamo Musabyimana Célestin na Somayire Rubona kandi uru
rubanza INTERTRADE FC Ltd iri mu gihombo itabayemo umuburanyi cyangwa ngo uru rubanza
rube ari rwo rwatambamirwaga, ko n’ikiregerwa muri izo manza zombi atari kimwe. Bityo ko
INTERTRADE FC Ltd iri mu gihombo isanga iki kirego cyatanzwe na Musabyimana Celestin na
Somayire Rubona Freddy batambamira imikirize y’urubanza RS/REV/RCOM 00008/2022/HCC
cyaragombaga kwakirwa kigasuzumwa mu mizi yacyo.
[17] Bavuga kandi ko kubirebana n’ibyo uhagarariye ECOBANK RWANDA Plc avuga ko
ikirego cya Musabyimana Célestin na Somayire Rubona Freddy kuko batambamiye urubanza
rutaburanishijwe mu mizi yarwo, basanga nta shingiro bigomba guhabwa kuko urebye isesengura
Urukiko rwakoze mu rubanza RS/REV/RCOM 00008/2022/HCC usanga rwaraburanishijwe mu
mizi.
[18] Uhagarariye ECOBANK RWANDA Plc avuga ko ubujurire bwa Musabyimana Célestin
na Somayire Rubona Freddy nta shingiro bufite, kuko kuba Urukiko Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi
rwaranze kwakira ikirego cyabo cyo gutambamira imikirize y’urubanza RS/REV/RCOM
00008/2022/HCC rwaciwe ku wa 17/11/2023 nyuma yo gusanga icyaburanwaga cyari
cyarafashweho icyemezo mu rubanza Nº 00001/2021/CA, kandi Musabyimana Célestin na
Somayire Rubona Freddy bararubayemo ababuranyi, asanga nta kosa rwakoze. Bityo ko ibyo
baburanishije muri urwo rubanza bakabitsindirwa, batagombaga kongera kubigarura mu rubanza
RCOMA 00063/2024/HCC basaba gutambamira imikirize y’urubanza RS/REV/RCOM
00008/2022/HCC mu gihe bari barabitsindiwe mu rubanza Nº 00001/2021/CA rwamaze kuba
Itegeko, bagamije ko icyemezo cyafashwe muri urwo rubanza gihinduka.

[19] Avuga kandi ko ashingiye ku ngingo ya 161, igika cya 3, y’Itegeko Nº 22/2018 ryo ku wa
29/04/2018 ryibukijwe haruguru, iteganya ko hatambamirwa urubanza rwafashwemo icyemezo
mu mizi kandi rutagishoboye kujuririrwa, asanga ikirego cya Musabyimana Célestin na Somayire
Rubona Freddy kitaragombaga kwakirwa, kuko batambamiye urubanza RS/REV/RCOM
00008/2022/HCC rutigeze ruburanishwa mu mizi kandi itegeko ribibuza.
UKO URUKIKO RUBIBONA
[20] Impaka ziri muri uru rubanza zishingiye ku kumenya niba ikirego Musabyimana Célestin
na Somayire Rubona Freddy batanze mu Rukiko Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi batambamira urubanza
RS/REV/RCOM 00008/2022/HCC cyaragombaga kwakirwa. Mu gusubiza iki kibazo, Urukiko
rurabanza rusuzume niba urubanza RS/REV/RCOM 00008/2022/HCC rwaraburanishijwe mu
mizi yarwo, ku buryo rwagombaga gutambamirwa.
[21] Ingingo ya 161, igika cya 3, y’Itegeko Nº 22/2018 ryo ku wa 29/04/2018 ryerekeye
imiburanishirize y’imanza z’imbonezamubano, iz’ubucuruzi, iz’umurimo n’iz’ubutegetsi iteganya
ibikurikira: “Hatambamirwa urubanza rwafashwemo icyemezo mu mizi kandi rutagishoboye
kujuririrwa.”
[22] Iyi ngingo yumvikanisha ko urubanza rutambamirwa rugomba kuba rwujuje ibintu bibiri
ari byo kuba rwaburanishijwe mu mizi no kuba rutagishoboye kujuririrwa. Ibi byumvikanisha ko
iyo kimwe muri ibi bisabwa kituzuye, ikirego cyo gutambama kitakirwa kuko kiba kinyuranyije
n’amategeko.
[23] Ku birebana n’uru rubanza, dosiye igaragaza ko uru rubanza rukomoka ku kirego
Musabyimana Célestin na Somayire Rubona Freddy batanze mu Rukiko Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi
batambamira urubanza RS/REV/RCOM 00008/2022/HCC. Muri urwo rubanza INTERTRADE
FC Ltd yasubirishagamo ingingo nshya urubanza RCOMA 00256/15/HCC rwaciwe n’Urukiko
Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi ku wa 03/07/2015, hanyuma urwo Rukiko rusanga ikirego cya
INTERTRADE FC Ltd cyo gusubirishamo ingingo nshya urubanza RCOMA 00256/15/HCC
kidakwiye kwakirwa kuko impamvu ishingiraho zidahuye n’ibiteganywa n’ingingo ya 170
y’Itegeko Nº 22/2018 ryo ku wa 29/04/2018 ryavuzwe haruguru.
[24] Urukiko rurasanga, kuba mu rubanza rujuririrwa, Musabyimana Célestin na Somayire
Rubona Freddy baratambamiye urubanza RS/REV/RCOM 00008/2022/HCC, nyamara urwo
rubanza rutarigize ruburanishwa mu mizi yarwo, kuko ikirego cya INTERTRADE FC Ltd
kitakiriwe, birumvikana ko icyo ikirego gitambamira urubanza cyatanzwe mu buryo bunyuranyije
n’amategeko, kuko nk’uko byasobanuwe haruguru, ntabwo umuburanyi yemerewe gutambamira
urubanza rutakiriye ikirego. Kuba rero Musabyimana Célestin na Somayire Rubona Freddy
baratambamiye urubanza rutakiriye ikirego, biragaragara ko ikirego cyabo kitari cyujuje ibisabwa
n’ingingo ya 161, igika cya 3, y’Itegeko Nº 22/2018 yavuzwe haruguru.
[25] Ku byo uhagarariye Musabyimana Célestin na Somayire Rubona Freddy avuga ko ikirego
cyo gutambamira urubanza RS/REV/RCOM 00008/2022/HCC batanze mu Rukiko Rukuru
rw’Ubucuruzi cyagombaga kwakirwa, kuko ikiburanwa mu rubanza rujuririrwa RCOMA
00063/2024/HCC gitandukanye n’icyaburanwe mu rubanza Nº00001/2021/CA, kandi
n’ababuranyi atari bamwe, Urukiko rurasanga ntacyo byamara mu gihe batambamiye urubanza

rutaburanishijwe mu mizi, kandi itegeko ritabyemera. Bityo kuba ikirego cya Musabyimana
Célestin na Somayire Rubona Freddy kitarakiriwe nta kosa ryakozwe, kuko cyatanzwe mu buryo
bunyuranyije n’amategeko.
2.Kumenya niba amafaranga y’ikurikiranarubanza n’igihembo cya Avoka asabwa muri uru
rubanza afite ishingiro
[26] Uhagarariye Musabyimana Célestin na Somayire Rubona Freddy asaba Urukiko
rw’Ubujurire gutegeka ECOBANK RWANDA Plc kubaha amafaranga miliyoni icumi
(10.000.000Frw) y’ikurikiranarubanza na miliyoni eshatu (3.000.000Frw) y’igihembo cya Avoka.
Avuga kandi ko amafaranga ECOBANK RWANDA Plc isaba nta shingiro afite, kuko
n’imyiregurire yayo nta shingiro ifite.
[27] Uhagarariye INTERTRADE FC Ltd asaba Urukiko ko nirusanga ikirego gifite ishingiro
rwazategeka ECOBANK RWANDA Plc kwishyura INTERTRADE FC Ltd amafaranga ibihumbi
magana atanu (500.000 Frw) y’ikurikiranarubanza, na miliyoni imwe (1.000.000 Frw) y’igihembo
cya Avoka.
[28] Uhagarariye ECOBANK RWANDA Plc yiregura ku mafaranga Musabyimana Célestin na
Somayire Rubona Freddy basaba, ndetse n’ayo INTERTRADE FC Ltd isaba, avuga ko ntayo
bakwiye guhabwa, kubera ko ntaho ashingiye. Avuga kandi ko asaba Urukiko rw’Ubujurire
gutegeka Musabyimana Celestin na Somayire Rubona Freddy kwishyurwa ECOBANK
RWANDA Plc miliyoni esheshatu (6.000.000Frw) y'igihembo cy'Avoka n’ibihumbi magana atanu
(500.000 Frw) y’ikurikiranarubanza.
UKO URUKIKO RUBIBONA
[29] Ingingo ya 111 y’Itegeko N° 22/2018 ryo ku wa 29/04/2018 ryerekeye imiburanishirize
y’imanza z’imbonezamubano, iz’ubucuruzi, iz’umurimo n’iz’ubutegetsi iteganya ibikurikira:
“Ikirego cy’amafaranga y’ikurikiranarubanza ni ikirego gishamikira ku kirego cy’iremezo
kigamije kwishyuza ibyakoreshejwe mu rubanza. Ikirego cy’amafaranga y’ikurikiranarubanza
kiburanishirizwa rimwe n’ikirego cy’iremezo. Gishobora kandi kwakirwa kikanaburanishwa n’iyo
ikirego cy’iremezo cyaba kitakiriwe”.
[30] Urukiko rurasanga amafaranga y’igihembo cya Avoka n’ay’ikurikiranarubanza
Musabyimana Célestin na Somayire Rubona Freddy basaba ntayo bakwiye guhabwa, kuko
ubujurire bwabo nta shingiro bwahawe. Rurasanga ahubwo ayo ECOBANK RWANDA Plc isaba
ikwiye kuyahabwa, kuko ubujurire bwa Musabyimana Célestin na Somayire Rubona Freddy
bwatumye ishaka Avoka wo kuyiburanira inakurikirana urubanza; rurasanga ariko ayo isaba ari
menshi ugereranyije n’ibyakozwe mu rubanza, bityo mu bushishozi bw’Urukiko ruyigeneye
ibihumbi magana atanu (500.000 Frw) y’igihembo cya Avoka n’ibihumbi magana abiri (200.000
Frw) y’ikurikiranarubanza, kuri uru rwego, yiyongera k’uyo yagenewe mu Rukiko Rukuru
rw’Ubucuruzi angana n’ibihumbi magana cyenda (900.000 Frw), yose hamwe akaba miliyoni
n’ibihumbi magana atandatu (1.600.000Frw) agomba gutangwa na Musabyimana Célestin na
Somayire Rubona Freddy. Naho ayo INTERTRADE FC Ltd isaba ECOBANK RWANDA Plc nta
shingiro afite, kuko ntaho ashingiye.

III. ICYEMEZO CY’URUKIKO
[31] Rwemeje ko ubujurire bwa Musabyimana Célestin na Somayire Rubona Freddy nta
shingiro bufite.
[32] Rwemeje ko urubanza RCOMA 00063/2024/HCC rwaciwe n’Urukiko Rukuru
rw’Ubucuruzi ku wa 10/10/2024, rwanze kwakira ikirego cyatanzwe Musabyimana Célestin na
Somayire Rubona Freddy gitambamira urubanza RS/REV/RCOM 00008/2022/HCC,
rudahindutse.
[33] Rutegetse Musabyimana Célestin na Somayire Rubona Freddy kwishyura ECOBANK
RWANDA Plc ibihumbi magana atanu (500.000 Frw) y’igihembo cya Avoka n’ibihumbi magana
abiri (200.000Frw) y’ikurikiranarubanza, kuri uru rwego, yiyongera k’uyo yagenewe mu Rukiko
Rukuru rw’Ubucuruzi angana n’ibihumbi magana cyenda (900.000Frw), yose hamwe akaba
miliyoni n’ibihumbi magana atandatu (1.600.000Frw).
[34] Ruvuze ko ingwate y’amagarama yatanzwe ihwanye n’ibyakozwe mu rubanza.
